signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2.2% YoY (Undershot Forecasts Amid Oil Surge)** | NO | HIGH confidence[1][3]

South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to **2.2%** in March 2026 from 2.0% prior, below market expectations of 2.4%, per official data released April 2[1][3]. Core inflation eased to 2.2% from 2.3%, with monthly CPI up 0.3% despite petroleum jumps of 10.4% tied to Iran conf

signals.headline: Republicans in Congress, including Senate Majority Leader John Thune, are reportedly "eager" for an off-ramp from the on
signals.raw: Republicans in Congress, including Senate Majority Leader John Thune, are reportedly "eager" for an off-ramp from the ongoing Iran war amid high gas prices and a looming 60-day War Powers Act deadline, with upcoming floor votes potentially exposing GOP rifts; Democrats like Chuck Schumer are pushing war powers resolutions to force votes on ending hostilities.[1][4]

signals.headline: VP **JD Vance**'s recent Iran talks in Islamabad collapsed without agreement (blamed mutually), followed by Hungarian PM
signals.raw: VP **JD Vance**'s recent Iran talks in Islamabad collapsed without agreement (blamed mutually), followed by Hungarian PM Viktor Orbán's election defeat after Vance campaigned for him; this drew Democratic criticism (e.g., Gavin Newsom, Schumer) and Trump threats to blockade the Strait of Hormuz, but no resolutions emerged.[2][4][5]

signals.headline: **Vance** met Senate GOP at their weekly lunch post-recess to discuss a sweeping tax/border/energy/defense bill, includi
signals.raw: **Vance** met Senate GOP at their weekly lunch post-recess to discuss a sweeping tax/border/energy/defense bill, including potential Medicaid cuts, but no outcomes confirmed.[3]
